text:
FBIS)

The Soviet freighter Smela arrived at Alexandria with large crates on deck on 3 April and berthed in the port's security area. When it passed Istanbul coming out of the Black Sea, the Smela made the usual false declaration of Soviet ships carrying military equipment to Egypt--machinery for Albania. Its arrival at Alexandria brings to 18 the number of arms cargoes transported by Soviet freighters to Egypt since deliveries began last October
